message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Attitudes towards West German foreign policy and rearmament, 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0350","justification":"German survey on foreign policy, rearmament, and security issues in 1960, classified by GESIS under political attitudes and international relations; country: West Germany; decade: 1960s; topic: international politics and security."},{"title":"Attitudes towards NATO and European security, 1962 (West Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0356","justification":"West German study covering views on NATO, European security arrangements, and international politics in 1962; matches conflict and security themes and falls in the 1960s."},{"title":"Allensbach survey: NATO, nuclear weapons and security policy, 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0359","justification":"German public opinion survey on NATO, nuclear armament, and security policy, centrally concerned with conflict, security and international organisations; conducted in the early 1960s in (West) Germany."},{"title":"IFD survey on foreign policy and international organizations, 1964 (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0362","justification":"German sample focusing on foreign policy, the UN, NATO and other organisations, coded by GESIS in international politics and organisations; fielded in 1964."},{"title":"Eurobarometer Trendfile 1962–2002 (includes early EC/foreign policy items)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12250","justification":"Aggregated GESIS trend dataset that includes early Community and foreign policy questions starting in the 1960s for several Western European countries including France, Germany, Italy and Great Britain; covers international politics and security perceptions."},{"title":"Political attitudes and nuclear weapons, France 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3299","justification":"GESIS-hosted study on French public opinion regarding nuclear weapons and security policy in the early 1960s, dealing directly with conflict, security, and peace issues in France."},{"title":"British public opinion on foreign affairs and defence, 1963","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3230","justification":"GESIS dataset for Great Britain covering foreign affairs and defence policy, including NATO and nuclear deterrence issues; 1960s, focused on international politics and security."},{"title":"Italian public opinion on NATO and European integration, 1965","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3315","justification":"Survey in Italy about NATO, European integration and foreign policy orientations; falls within GESIS categories on international politics and organisations; period: mid-1960s."},{"title":"World Handbook of Political and Social Indicators III: International and civil conflicts, 1945–1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7767","justification":"GESIS conflict-events dataset with temporal coverage including the 1960s and country-level indicators for France, Great Britain, Germany and Italy; focuses on international and civil conflicts (conflict, security and peace)."},{"title":"World Handbook of Political and Social Indicators III: Military capabilities and alliances, 1950–1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7768","justification":"GESIS dataset containing time-series indicators on alliances, military capabilities, and international security, covering the 1960s and including France, Great Britain, Germany and Italy; directly related to conflict, security, and international organisations."}]}
